case_title: VERNALI,RONALD J.DBA GENESIS CONSTRUCTION SERVICES VS RESCH, PHILIP et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VERNALI,RONALD J.DBA GENESIS CONSTRUCTION SERVICES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RESCH, PHILIP OLD REPUBLIC TITLE CO. OLD REPUBLIC WAIVES DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT RESCH DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $552.00 FILED BY VERNALI,RONALD J.DBA GENESIS CONSTRUCTION SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT RESCH, PHILIP OLD REPUBLIC TITLE CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OLD REPUBLIC TITLE CO.
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-02-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-19-2003 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
